title: Bound local classification work
description: Evaluation and private candidate validation must complete predictably at personal-ledger scale or fail before activation or mutation.
target: On the supported release host, evaluation of 10000 eligible transactions against 500 active rules and validation of 10000 private corpus rows each complete within 5 seconds and 256 MiB peak resident memory; every public operation advertises deterministic transaction, rule, corpus-row, memory, and processing-time limits; one-over-limit tests fail before rule activation or LEDGER mutation.
load_condition: Worst-case supported predicate mixes, all outcome types, maximum explanation evidence, and exact configured limit boundaries.
measurement: Published-binary benchmarks, peak-memory measurement, exact-limit and one-over-limit tests, and no-mutation assertions.
rationale: A local agent command must not hang, exhaust the host, or partially mutate when inputs are unexpectedly large.
